temporal_description: The audio is filled with a low, suspenseful, and atmospheric musical score that creates a sense of unease and anticipation. A man with short, dark hair, wearing a white collared shirt and a dark tie, is shown in profile. He has a serious and focused expression as he walks through a dimly lit, institutional-looking hallway. The scene is cast in a cool, greenish-blue light, suggesting an office or a medical facility at night. The camera is positioned as if looking through a doorway or a partition, with vertical bars partially obscuring the view. In the background, another person in a reflective vest is briefly visible. The camera pans slightly to follow the man's movement. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The sound of hurried footsteps on a hard surface echoes slightly, suggesting someone is walking purposefully through a quiet, possibly empty, corridor. The camera cuts to a different man, also in profile, standing in what appears to be the same or a similar dimly lit room. He is wearing a blue denim jacket. He looks down intently at a document he is holding in his hands. The background is cluttered with office-like items, including shelves and papers on the wall, all under the same cool, greenish lighting. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is steady, focusing on the man's concentrated expression as he examines the papers. The man in the denim jacket turns his back to the camera and continues to walk away, still looking down at the papers. The camera remains stationary, capturing his movement as he walks deeper into the room. The out-of-focus background and the consistent greenish lighting maintain the moody and serious atmosphere of the scene.
